Like others, geriatric population also will be benefitted considerably by physical activity, which will help in the reduction of functional impairment and improve lean body mass. 59 POINTS TO PONDER /c63A minimum 30-45 minutes brisk walk/physical activity of moderate intensity improves overall health. /c63Include ‘warm-up’and ‘cool- down’ periods, before and after the exercise regimen. /c63Forty five minutes per day of moderate intensity physical activity provides many health benefits. People with heart disease, high blood pressure, diabetes, asthma, osteoporosis and obesity should consult physician before taking up the exercise program.
